summary: Full backend + frontend testing of V4 Christ Church proposal microsite. All 14 test criteria verified. Backend 8/8 pass. Frontend all checks pass with zero console errors.

issues: SectionTag title 'Cedar vs. Synthetic' renders as uppercase via CSS — correct by design, confirmed in DOM via inner_text() returns 'CEDAR VS. SYNTHETIC'. The actual code value is correct.

critical_code_review_comments: EvidenceWall SectionTag says '96 captures' but there are 100 total (6 featured + 94 rail). Minor copy inconsistency — not a blocker.

Polycam inView+loaded gate: iframe only shows when both inView AND loaded are true. If user scrolls past before clicking, inView=true but loaded=false — clicking should still work since the button remains visible in that condition. Works as expected.
seed_data_creation: Two test interest submissions created: TEST_BoardMember + TEST_Persistence
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 passed fully. All sections verified: no Visualizer, Polycam click-to-load works, 100 evidence tiles (6+94), CedarBrava heading correct, BravaGallery first 4 have L&L gold badge, AspenLightStudy 240vh/90 frames/no VerifyTag, Craftsmanship video+2 sliders, Team 8 images/Jon Strand, Footer Jon Strand, Closing form POSTs and shows 'Received — thank you', 12 nav dots all present, 0 console errors.
